channel.title: D365 on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in D365 on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Why can't I bulk close the incomplete activities on a Dynamics 365 Campaign Activity?
item.description:
Personally, I find it rather frustrating that you can’t bulk close open activities when viewing in a sub-grid under Campaign Activity. Ultimately it comes down to how things work behind the scenes since Campaign Activities can distribute multiple types of activities (phone calls, emails, etc). Additionally, the out-of-the-box command bar logic for activity status changes (like “Mark Complete” or “Close”) relies on record-type-specific logic which can often also prompt for record-type-specific data.

See also https://share.gemini.google/PSJxwYoX8Y06​​​

item.title: Visualize data with the new hierarchy control in D365
item.description:
Check out this article: Visualize data with the new hierarchy control in D365

This looks super cool and nice to see it being added (back) in as native functionality.
